assumptionRegistry.assumption: M29 remains the active milestone during the final freeze step
assumptionRegistry.invalidationSignal: active milestone switches before freeze package is emitted
assumptionRegistry.verificationPlan: assert plan.activeMilestone and goal_state activeMilestoneId equal M29

assumptionRegistry.assumption: PRG-277 execution output remains a required precondition for PRG-278
assumptionRegistry.verificationPlan: require execution report label/ok and PRG-277=done

assumptionRegistry.assumption: Final rehearsal report is still canonical release-readiness evidence
assumptionRegistry.invalidationSignal: release-readiness source moves away from final_rehearsal report
assumptionRegistry.verificationPlan: require final report label plus releaseReady=true and queuedGapCount=0

assumptionRegistry.assumption: Freeze references must stay synchronized across PROGRAM_PLAN, SUBMISSION, and USAGE
assumptionRegistry.invalidationSignal: official reviewer-facing docs move to a new file set
assumptionRegistry.verificationPlan: enforce token checks in all three docs

assumptionRegistry.assumption: Demo/site snapshots must include the new M29 freeze report
assumptionRegistry.verificationPlan: assert DEMO/build_index/site_smoke all reference m29_governance_freeze snapshot

decisionRegistry.chosenOption: Wire m29-governance-freeze-check into ci for anti-drift enforcement
decisionRegistry.decision: Add an explicit M29 governance-freeze target in CI
decisionRegistry.reversalCondition: if freeze checks move to a dedicated release workflow outside ci
tradeoffs: con: higher CI coupling to freeze docs/artifacts

alternativesConsidered: allow PRG-278 planned state in freeze gate
decisionRegistry.chosenOption: PRG-278 must be done and open M29 rows must be zero
decisionRegistry.decision: Require queue-closure state at governance freeze
decisionRegistry.reversalCondition: if protocol changes to permit staged freeze with open queue items
tradeoffs: con: requires completion update before gate pass

decisionRegistry.chosenOption: Emit command list plus SHA256 manifest for final tracker/docs/artifacts
decisionRegistry.decision: Publish hashed freeze package for handoff reproducibility
decisionRegistry.reversalCondition: if artifact attestation is delegated to external release tooling
tradeoffs: con: artifact set must remain stable

alternativesConsidered: mark M29 completed without a successor milestone
decisionRegistry.chosenOption: Preserve one-active-milestone guardrail and represent freeze via zero open queue
decisionRegistry.decision: Keep M29 as active milestone while queue is frozen
decisionRegistry.reversalCondition: if plan constraints are updated to allow zero active milestones
tradeoffs: con: active status must be interpreted with queue state

decisionRegistry.chosenOption: Require step_execution_map PRG-278 command to point at freeze target
decisionRegistry.decision: Use PRG-278 step map entry as canonical replay command
decisionRegistry.reversalCondition: if step execution replay moves to another orchestrator

riskLedger.mitigation: CI freeze gate requires PRG-278 done and zero open M29 queue rows
riskLedger.risk: Queue drift can reopen work after freeze

riskLedger.mitigation: Token checks enforce synchronized command/artifact references across release docs
riskLedger.risk: Release docs may diverge from executable freeze command path

riskLedger.mitigation: Freeze gate requires final rehearsal report releaseReady=true with zero queued gaps
riskLedger.risk: Final release readiness signal can become stale after tracker edits

riskLedger.mitigation: build_index + site_smoke + DEMO checks require m29_governance_freeze snapshot references
riskLedger.risk: Demo evidence panel can drift from current freeze artifact set

riskLedger.mitigation: decision registry records explicit reversal condition for one-active-milestone model
riskLedger.risk: Future milestone model changes can invalidate active-milestone freeze semantics
